text:
……お疲れ様。
連携、うまくなっていたと思う。

……私も、改めて自分の長所と短所に
向き合えたと思う。

……貴方も今一度、立ち止まって
よく思い返して見てほしいわ。
それでまた得るものもあるはず。

……それじゃ、私はこれで。
また機会があったら、よ

Good work. You've definitely improved your
cooperative techniques, I must say.

It was a good chance for me to face my
strengths and weaknesses as well.

I hope you will take a moment to reflect on all
that we've learned.
You may find something else of value to you.

I do hope we get the chance to work together
again. Now, if you'll excuse me...
